node.statement: N1.3 (the lift is O(eta)-eps-JB — DIRECT lem-cstar import with H:=K, NO Wedderburn). By GT-hyp the dilation space is the FULL matrix algebra B(K) for a finite-dimensional Hilbert space K, and F:B(K)->B(K) is a UCP map with ||F^2-F||_cb<=eta<1/4; thus F is a unital eta-idempotent UCP map on B(K). Instantiate GT-cstar-sa-to-epsjb (lem-cstar-sa-to-epsjb) with H:=K: its hypothesis 'F a unital eta-idempotent UCP map on B(H)' holds VERBATIM with B(H):=B(K) (D IS the full B(K) — no general finite-dim C*-algebra, no Wedderburn bridge, no Stinespring-stack re-derivation). Hence Ftilde=theta(2F-1), B=Im Ftilde carries the Choi-Effros product X star Y=Ftilde(XY), and by GT-cstar-sa-to-epsjb the self-adjoint part B_sa under the symmetrized product X osymm Y=(1/2)(X star Y+Y star X) is an O(eta)-eps-JB order-unit algebra (def-eps-jb-algebra) with universal dimension-free constants. Call this eps_B<=C eta.
